name: senkani-improve
command: senkani improve --iterations 20 --pre-score 'swift test && swift run -c release senkani bench --json' --post-score 'swift test && swift run -c release senkani bench --json' --merge-on score_up --discard-on score_down --log ~/.senkani/improve/$(date +%F).md
description: Nightly 21:00 autoimprove run inside a fresh worktree: 20 iterations, merge on score-up, discard on score-down.
